dialogos.texto_en: (After finishing dinner and returning to my room,\n I couldn't help but feel distressed\n as I recapitulated the day at the beach.)
*sigh*
(What was that fuzzy feeling I had at lunch today?)
(I didn't experience anything unpleasant, but...)
(Well, it didn't feel good\n being the subject of those guys' mockery.)
(For better or for worse, the quintuplets stand out,\n so it's natural to draw attention\n when we're together%p-2;――%p;)
One guy and five girls? That's obviously unbalanced.
(I see, could it be that one phrase that unconsciously\n stuck with me?)
Unbalanced, eh...
(In other words, at that moment,\n I felt uneasy about being with Nino.)
(Looking back at it, it kinda explains my fuzzy feeling.)
(I can explain why I confessed my feelings to Nino\n and why I fell for her%p-2;――\n%p; It's because of my own feelings.)
(But%p-2;――%p; why did Nino fall for me?)
I fell in love with you because you're you, Fu-kun.
(Because I'm me? What's that?)
(Originally, at the school camping trip, I disguised\n myself as Kintaro and Nino fell in love with me.\n After that, she confessed to me.)
(She said she wanted me to know\n how much she loved me...but we've\n never really talked about what she likes about me.)
(It seems that Kintaro was exactly Nino's type\n based on his appearance...)
(Even at the school festival she said that\n my dad was handsome.)
(Based on her reaction during the school trip,\n Nino...might actually slightly prefer 'bad boys.')
(However, unlike before,\n I am far from being that type of person.)
I don't get it...
(Come to think of it, Nino might be\n the least compatible girl\n out of the five of them, maybe?)
(Nino is a fashionable, trendy, and modern\n high school girl. However, I don't know anything\n about trends, and I'm not interested.)
(On the other hand, I'm old-fashioned\n and my conversation skills are limited...)
(However, I have my strengths!\n I got third place in the national mock exams!)
(But Nino doesn't care about it.)
Huh?
(Why am I dating Nino?\n Isn't it a miracle that we're even together?!)
(No way!\n I have absolutely no intention\n of doubting Nino's feelings for me!!)
(After all, she's been showing me\n how much she cares about me.)
(Is this the reason?\n Am I just taking advantage of Nino's affection...?)
(It's ridiculous to think\n that I'm taking advantage of her.\n As lovers, we should respect each other as equals.)
(If we keep going on like this,\n with our relationship being inconsistent...)
(There's a possibility\n that Nino might get tired of me someday, huh?)
This is NOT enough to show her what kind of man I am.
I need to take the initiative to Nino,\nand make the first move... I-I've gotta kiss her!\nI must make this miracle come to life!
(Alright, in order to lead Nino in our relationship,\n I need to understand what she likes.)
(Damn it, it's pathetic that I'm thinking about our \n relationship now! Even though we're dating, I've been\n neglectful of things like that because of the exams!)
(Fortunately or unfortunately, Nino's sisters,\n who know her better than anyone else,\n are with us on this trip. I can still make it up!)
(Starting tomorrow, I'll begin investigating Nino!)
